ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the stock exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the stock exchange's official website */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the stock exchange was founded */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Total market capitalization of the exchange */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Average daily trading volume on the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOG) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the company belongs */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the company belongs */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "geographic_region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the initial public offering (IPO) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the stock */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the stock price is recorded */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the specified date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the specified date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the specified date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the specified date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the specified date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the specified date */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the stock */,
  "after_hours_price" REAL /* After-hours price of the stock */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) for the day */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price compared to the previous day */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source (foreign key to `data_sources`) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the analyst (e.g., researcher, investor, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team the analyst belongs to (foreign key to `teams`) */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* JSON object or a text field to store the analyst's areas of expertise */,
  "joining_date" TEXT /* Date the analyst joined the firm */,
  "last_access" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last access to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "parent_industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent industry (for hierarchical industry classification) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Total market capitalization of the industry */,
  "average_pe_ratio" REAL /* Average price-to-earnings ratio of companies in the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector (for hierarchical sector classification) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Total market capitalization of the sector */,
  "average_pe_ratio" REAL /* Average price-to-earnings ratio of companies in the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company profile */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being tracked */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's official website */,
  "mission_statement" TEXT /* Company's mission statement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_profiles_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial statement */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being tracked */,
  "statement_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial statement */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the company for the specified period */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income of the company for the specified period */,
  "net_profit_margin" REAL /* Net profit margin of the company */,
  "ebitda" REAL /* Earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization */,
  "cash_flow" REAL /* Cash flow from operations */,
  "debt_to_equity" REAL /* Debt-to-equity ratio */,
  "profit_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual profit growth rate */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source (foreign key to `data_sources`) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_statements_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_statements_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., API, CSV) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update from the data source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the analyst accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the analyst's browser */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session during which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being analyzed */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst generating the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the research report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the report (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation for the stock (e.g., buy, hold, sell) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source (foreign key to `data_sources`) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_reports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_reports_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being mentioned in the news */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date when the news was published */,
  "news_headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "news_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news article */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source (foreign key to `data_sources`) */,
  "article_url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  "sentiment_score" TEXT /* Sentiment score of the news (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_news_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media post */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being mentioned in the post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date when the post was made */,
  "post_text" TEXT /* Text of the social media post */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source (foreign key to `data_sources`) */,
  "sentiment_score" TEXT /* Sentiment score of the post (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform where the post was made (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team's focus and responsibilities */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team manager (foreign key to `analysts`) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)
